title: Allow mounts.conf entries for equal source and destination paths
body:
It is now possible to simplify entries in `mounts.conf` files if the
source and destination paths are equal, like this:

```
/my/very/long/path:/my/very/long/path
```

can be now written as:

```
/my/very/long/path
```

The documentation has been adapted as well as the testing.

comments.body:
> Code LGTM. In the tests, I'd prefer to preserve the setup/teardown logic to properly clean up the test data.
> 
> Other than that, I really like the idea +1

Thanks for the review, I moved the setup/teardown parts back to their original functions but kept the refactoring

LGTM assuming we can get the tests to behave.  Thanks @saschagrunert!
